mnemonics.title: 7 Steps in Order: PPDISLF
mnemonics.content: **P**urpose, **P**rocess, **D**omain, **I**nformation, **S**ervice, **L**evel, **F**unctional. Remember: 'Please Process Domain Information, Service Levels First'.

mnemonics.title: Step 1 Requirements: FS-NF
mnemonics.content: **F**unctional (what system does) and **N**on-**F**unctional (how it performs - security, scalability). Always define both types!

mnemonics.title: Domain Model vs Information Model
mnemonics.content: **D**omain = **E**ntities and **R**elationships (UML diagrams). **I**nformation = **S**chema and **S**emantics (JSON format). Think: DER for Domain, ISS for Information.

mnemonics.title: IoT Level Quick Reference
mnemonics.content: **L1**: Single device, local. **L2**: Single device, cloud. **L3**: Multi-device, cloud. **L4**: Multi-device + fog. **L5-L6**: Large WAN + fog + cloud coordination.

mnemonics.title: Exam Strategy for Design Methodology
mnemonics.content: Always list all **7 steps in order**. Know **Domain vs Info model** difference. Apply methodology to a **scenario** (weather station, smart home). Know **IoT Levels** characteristics.
